name: Input
summary: An input field with radial gradient border hover effect that follows mouse position.
detailedDescription: Input creates a form input with interactive border highlight using Framer Motion. A motion.div wrapper tracks mouse position via useMotionValue (mouseX/mouseY), calculating offset from element's getBoundingClientRect. On hover enter, visible state triggers radial gradient background that expands from 0px to 100px radius at cursor position. The gradient uses blue-500 (#3b82f6) fading to transparent at 80%, creating glowing border effect. Input itself has gray-50 background (dark: zinc-800), h-10 height, rounded-md corners, and shadow-input. Focus shows 2px ring (neutral-400 light, neutral-600 dark). Dark mode includes subtle outer shadow. Transition duration 400ms for smooth hover on/off. The effect creates premium feel by highlighting input border nearest cursor, guiding attention to active field. Ideal for signup forms, search bars, or any input where enhanced visual feedback improves user experience.
purpose: Provide glowing border highlight on hover
Track mouse position for gradient placement
Enhance form inputs with premium feel
behavior: Tracks mouse position with motion values
Expands radial gradient on hover enter
Applies blue glow to border area
recommendations: Suitable for performance-sensitive pages that still need polished visuals.
